item.title: ‘Gasgas na script’: Makabayan bloc rejects conspiracy claim on Duterte impeachment proceedings
item.description: The Makabayan bloc urged Vice President Sara Duterte to face the inquiries of the House Committee on Justice into her alleged misuse of confidential funds, saying they reject Duterte’s “recycled claim” that it was a political weapon and a “conspiracy” against her.

item.title: Some Filipinos agreed to become spies for money, say nat’l security officials
item.description: National security officials in the Philippines on Saturday said the recent discovery of Filipino spies allegedly linked with China shows the importance of strengthening the country’s systems to prevent this from happening again.

item.title: Suspek sa pamamaril sa condominium sa Parañaque, hawak na ng pulisya
item.description: Habang inilalabas ng mga awtoridad ang nakaposas na suspek, pinagmumura ito ng ilang testigo at kakilala ng mga nasawi.

item.title: Posible bang mabawi ang lupang binenta ng co-owner?
item.description: “Ang isang may-ari ng lupa ay maaaring gamitin ang kaniyang karapatan ng pagtupos o right of legal redemption kung ang share ng iba pang co-owners ay ipinagbili sa panibagong tao. Kung ang halaga ng binentang lupa ay labis na mataas, ang tumutubos ay magbabayad lamang ng makatarungang presyo.”

item.title: Stradcom denies graft allegations, affirms compliance with LTO-IT contract
item.description: Information technology firm Stradcom Corporation (STRADCOM) said its operations with the Land Transportation Office (LTO) were covered by a valid concession agreement with the government, amid graft allegations filed before the Office of the Ombudsman by a transport group.

item.title: Rhian Ramos to pursue possible legal action over driver’s assault claims
item.description: Actress Rhian Ramos said she is already looking into possible legal actions against her former driver, who alleged that she, Michelle Dee, and Sam Panlilio physically assaulted and illegally detained him back in January.

item.title: ‘I am deeply sorry’: Suntay’s wife breaks silence on husband's Anne Curtis remark
item.description: The wife of Rep. Bong Suntay has issued a public statement distancing herself and her children from the controversial remarks the Quezon City lawmaker made during a House impeachment hearing, after his comments referencing actress Anne Curtis sparked widespread backlash online.

item.title: No double standard in impeachment proceedings — House justice panel members
item.description: Leaders of the House Committee on Justice asserted there was no double standard in its deliberations on the impeachment complaints against the country’s two highest officials.

item.title: DSWD urges stronger cooperation among ASEAN states amid global tensions
item.description: Social Welfare Secretary Rex Gatchalian called on other members of the Association of Southeast Asian Nations (ASEAN) for stronger cooperation amid global headwinds.

item.title: Man wanted for inciting to sedition surrenders to police
item.description: The Quezon City Police District on Thursday said it has successfully served a warrant of arrest against an individual wanted for inciting to sedition.
